TestCase z21Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_values = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_values, t1.values, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.values = follow_case_values;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive check: need at least 1 element
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Set a random element to its square (when result fits in int)
    int idx = rand() % follow_case.n;
    long long sq = 1LL * follow_case.values[idx] * follow_case.values[idx];
    if (sq <= 2147483647LL && sq >= -2147483648LL) {
        follow_case.values[idx] = (int)sq;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
